mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmDiscntUsage :: selectById */ u.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , dis.discnt_nm AS discnt_id_nm , mem.member_nm AS member_nm , ord.member_nm AS order_nm , ite.prod_nm AS order_item_nm , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm FROM pm_discnt_usage u LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = u.site_id LEFT JOIN pm_discnt dis ON dis.discnt_id = u.discnt_id LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = u.member_id LEFT JOIN od_order ord ON ord.order_id = u.order_id LEFT JOIN od_order_item ite ON ite.order_item_id = u.order_item_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = u.prod_id WHERE u.discnt_usage_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) /* base.ec.pm :: PmDiscntUsage :: selectPageCount */ FROM pm_discnt_usage u
